---
title: "The Rev. Edward Bouverie Pusey"
---

## The Rev. Edward Bouverie Pusey

**Dates:** (1800-1882)

### Description

Regius Professor of Hebrew at Oxford University

### Biography

He married (1828), Maria Catherine Barker (d. 1839).  He had three daughters and a son, of whom only one daughter survived him.

### Letters

- Letter from December 12, 1896
- Letter from Feb 15th 1894
- Letter from June 7. [1869]
- Letter from Christmas Day [25 December], 1867.
- Letter from Febry 5th [1866]
- Letter from 1853
- Letter from March 14. 1849
- Letter from Novr 6th 1844

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
